event: Equestrian portrait of the Duke of Wellington
description: A dramatic full-length equestrian portrait of a man in a dark cloak and white breeches mounted on a rearing brown horse. He raises his hat in his right hand in a gesture of command or acknowledgment, while controlling the horse with his left. The background is dark and smoky, suggesting a battlefield, with warm amber light breaking through. The horse is powerfully rendered, muscles taut, mane flowing. An inscription plaque is visible at the lower right.
